design_philosophy.core_concept: Familiar Utility meets Luxury Editorial. The interface feels like WhatsApp, but the content inside feels like a high-end travel magazine.

font_family.ui: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

chat_container.structure: flex flex-col h-screen max-w-md mx-auto bg-chat shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative border-x border-gray-300

header.style: bg-primary text-white p-4 flex items-center shadow-md z-10

message_list.style: flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4 bg-transparent z-0 custom-scrollbar

input_area.style: bg-[#f0f2f5] p-3 flex items-center gap-2 z-10

message_bubble.user: bg-[#d9fdd3] text-gray-900 rounded-lg rounded-tr-none shadow-sm p-2 max-w-[85%] self-end relative mb-1
message_bubble.bot: bg-white text-gray-900 rounded-lg rounded-tl-none shadow-sm p-2 max-w-[85%] self-start relative mb-1
message_bubble.tail_fix: Use absolute positioning or SVG for the little triangle tail if desired, but rounded corners are sufficient for MVP.

activity_card.wrapper: bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-md w-full mt-2 border border-gray-100
activity_card.image: w-full h-40 object-cover hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500
activity_card.title: font-heading text-lg font-bold text-gray-900
activity_card.price_tag: bg-secondary/10 text-primary font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs self-start
activity_card.button: w-full bg-primary text-white py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors mt-2

booking_confirmation.style: bg-white rounded-lg p-6 border-t-4 border-secondary shadow-lg text-center

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Install 'lucide-react' and 'framer-motion' if not present.
2. Global CSS: Add the font imports for Playfair Display in index.css.
3. Tailwind: Extend the theme with the colors provided above in tailwind.config.js.
4. Component Structure: Create 'ChatInterface', 'MessageBubble', 'ActivityCard' as separate components.
5. Layout: Ensure the main container has 'max-w-md' and is centered to simulate a mobile app view on desktop.
6. Scroll: Implement 'scroll-to-bottom' behavior automatically when new messages arrive.
7. Mock Data: Use the provided asset URLs for the mock database/activity list.
8. Escalation: When the bot escalates, show a special system message styled with a yellow background/border.
universal_guidelines: Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Use specific properties for transitions (NOT transition: all).
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
